title: astragalus frigidus subsp. parviflorus
intro: Astragalus frigidus subsp. parviflorus, also known as parviflorus milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of isoflavones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Astragalus frigidus subsp. parviflorus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and enhance immune function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, often used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of menopause, among other uses.
